title: COAS
description: Connector-family Agnostic Structure (COAS). A document carries inputs, exactly one 'connector' component, and outputs. Unlike RAS (which discriminates device type at the top level), COAS keeps a single 'connector' field and discriminates the family internally on connector.datasheetInfo.part.family, because the parametric core is shared across all connector families and only a small block differs per family.

inputs.description: Design requirements and operating points for this connector
inputs.title: inputs

outputs.description: Computed results per operating point. outputs[i] aligns positionally with inputs.operatingPoints[i].
outputs.title: outputs
